name: Mercosur (Common Market of the South)

colors.symbolism: the lettering and the Southern Cross

description: A white field bearing the green name 'MERCOSUR' / 'MERCOSUL' in stylised script, with four green stars representing the Southern Cross constellation.
history: Mercosur (Mercado Común del Sur) was established by the Treaty of Asunción in 1991. The flag features the organisation's name and the Southern Cross constellation on a white field.

features.symbolism: the Southern Cross constellation, identifying the southern hemisphere
